name: Studio
description: Warm, creative theme with coral accents and rich purple premium highlights. Friendly, approachable, premium but not cold. Inspired by Figma, Framer, Gumroad.

decorators.studio-canvas: Warm background using theme background token. Friendly, inviting foundation.
decorators.studio-surface: Soft surface elevation with 1px warm border and subtle shadow. Uses surface background.
decorators.studio-input: Warm border with coral focus ring and gentle glow effect. Friendly input styling.
decorators.studio-card: Surface background, soft shadow, 12px radius, hover lift transition.
decorators.studio-card-premium: Premium card with purple gradient border for exclusive content.
decorators.studio-divider: Warm hairline separator using border-color token.
decorators.studio-badge-tier: Tier badge with gradient backgrounds for subscription levels.
decorators.studio-avatar-creator: Larger creator avatar with accent ring highlight.
decorators.studio-fade-up: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 16px to 0, 250ms ease-out.
decorators.studio-skeleton: Loading placeholder with warm pulse animation.
decorators.studio-glow: Subtle primary-tinted glow effect for call-to-action buttons.
decorators.studio-gate-blur: Backdrop blur effect for content behind paywalls.

dashboard.description: Creator dashboard with sidebar navigation. Analytics, content management, subscriber views.

storefront.description: Fan-facing storefront with top navigation. Creator profiles, content browsing.

checkout.description: Minimal checkout flow with focused content area.

marketing.description: Marketing pages with top nav and footer. Clean sections with warm accents.

auth.description: Centered auth forms with warm card styling.

studio-canvas.description: Warm background using theme background token. Friendly, inviting foundation.
studio-canvas.intent: Use as the root page background to establish the warm, creative atmosphere. The off-white warmth differentiates this from cold corporate themes.

studio-surface.description: Soft surface elevation with 1px warm border and subtle shadow. Uses surface background.
studio-surface.intent: Use for sidebar panels and elevated content areas that need gentle visual separation from the canvas.

studio-input.description: Warm border with coral focus ring and gentle glow effect. Friendly input styling.
studio-input.intent: Use for all form inputs. The coral focus ring creates a warm, inviting interaction that matches the creative personality.

studio-card.description: Surface background, soft shadow, 12px radius, hover lift transition.
studio-card.intent: Use for content cards that need a friendly, tactile feel. The soft shadow and hover lift create approachable interactivity.

studio-card-premium.description: Premium card with purple gradient border for exclusive content.
studio-card-premium.intent: Use for premium or paid content containers. The purple gradient border signals exclusive, higher-tier content.

studio-divider.description: Warm hairline separator using border-color token.
studio-divider.intent: Use to create gentle visual separation between content sections. The warm tone matches the friendly aesthetic.

studio-badge-tier.description: Tier badge with gradient backgrounds for subscription levels.
studio-badge-tier.intent: Use for subscription tier labels and membership badges. Gradient backgrounds visually differentiate between tier levels.

studio-avatar-creator.description: Larger creator avatar with accent ring highlight.
studio-avatar-creator.intent: Use for creator profile images and author avatars. The accent ring draws attention and indicates creator status.

studio-fade-up.description: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 16px to 0, 250ms ease-out.
studio-fade-up.intent: Use as the entrance animation for content appearing on load. Slightly longer duration for a more relaxed, creative feel.

studio-skeleton.description: Loading placeholder with warm pulse animation.
studio-skeleton.intent: Use as a placeholder while content loads. The warm-toned pulse matches the creative, friendly aesthetic.

studio-glow.description: Subtle primary-tinted glow effect for call-to-action buttons.
studio-glow.intent: Use for primary CTA buttons and important action triggers. The coral glow creates warmth and urgency.

studio-gate-blur.description: Backdrop blur effect for content behind paywalls.
studio-gate-blur.intent: Use to obscure premium content behind paywalls. The blur teases content while clearly indicating it requires a subscription.
